shows.blurb: Dave Attell headlines with his legendary club prowess and crowd engagement. Tuesday in June gives this a decent drop-in window, though the supporting cast is solid mid-tier talent rather than heavy hitters who draw the big names.

shows.blurb: Colin Quinn is Cellar royalty and a notorious crowd-work machine who'll riff with the front row all night. Wednesday early show in June is prime drop-in territory, and Quinn's presence could pull in heavy hitters testing material.

shows.blurb: Greer Barnes anchors another Wednesday late show with Chappelle connections, and the SNL/alt-comedy mix (Fidance, Shornima) creates the eclectic vibe that sometimes attracts surprise guests working out new bits.
